## Change summary

## Validation

- [ ] Validation owned by every changed component has passed.
- [ ] Dependency and lockfile changes were reviewed for transitive runtime or UI behavior.
- [ ] Telemetry contract changes were coordinated across schemas, fixtures, producers, and consumers.
- [ ] Changes affecting Workflow detail preserve Graph, tree, state, URL, and deep-link synchronization.
- [ ] Mixed Agent/Workflow composition remains truthful and navigable.
- [ ] Renderer-boundary changes were tested with the real renderer, not only mocked DOM.
- [ ] Any intentional architectural behavior change was accepted in an ADR before implementation.
